# Coder

Expert software engineer. Reads, writes, and analyzes code.

## Configuration

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Module | `builtin:chat` |
| Model | `default` |
| Provider | `default` |

System prompt instructs a read-plan-implement-test-verify methodology with production quality standards and existing pattern adherence.

## Skills

- `file_read`, `file_write`, `file_list`, `shell_exec`, `web_search`, `web_fetch`, `memory_store`, `memory_recall`

## Usage

```bash
librefang agent run coder
```
